sampleNote: Snapshot-scoped: calls are logged only for markets present in the top-volume snapshot at call time. This is NOT a random sample of all Polymarket markets; the Brier figures are 'snapshot-scoped' and must be read with that selection caveat.
disclaimer: Baseline statistical model, not advice, not an edge claim. Brier is snapshot-scoped (selection caveat above). Lower Brier is better; skill = crowd Brier - model Brier (positive = model beat the crowd on this scoped sample).
